question: How many fitness classes do I attend in a typical week?

retrieval_results.context:
User mixes workout classes (Zumba, Hip Hop Abs, yoga, BodyPump), sets specific cardio endurance and strength goals, has a workout buddy named Emily, and finds progress motivating.
User seeks recommendations on how to incorporate protein shakes into their routine, especially on days when they have BodyPump classes.
User is exploring new fitness routines, specifically looking for home-based strength training exercises that can be performed on days other than Sunday because they have a yoga class at 6:00 PM on Sundays.
User attends Zumba classes on Tuesdays and Thursdays, arrives 15 minutes early to warm up, and wants suggestions for warm‑up exercises to prepare for the high‑energy class.
User is looking for workout playlist recommendations to motivate them during weightlifting classes, specifically BodyPump on Mondays at 6:30 PM.
User is looking for upbeat workout playlists for Zumba classes on Tuesdays and Thursdays at 7:00 PM and strength training playlists for BodyPump class on Mondays.
User meal‑preps on Sundays, brings healthy snacks to work to reduce junk food and stay motivated, and is considering adding protein‑rich snacks such as Greek yogurt or hard‑boiled eggs to support BodyPump classes on Mondays; they seek tips for keeping these snacks fresh and convenient at work.
User is looking for beginner‑friendly protein powders, particularly whey protein options that are easy to digest and taste good, and is unsure if whey is the right choice for them to support weightlifting classes on Mondays.
User is interested in bodyweight squats and lunges and requests detailed guidance on proper form and technique for these exercises.
User plans to create a chill hip‑hop or R&B playlist for their Sunday yoga class at 6:00 PM to help them unwind and relax during the session.
